fields.label: Turn
fields.description: The settled turn this effect belongs to (D2 §1a).

fields.label: Effect Name
fields.description: One of auto_title/rich_outputs/macro_advance/telemetry_flush/terminal_publish/usage; part of the UNIQUE (turn, effect_name) enforced via the composite doc name (D2 §1a).

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Set done inside the effect's own idempotent (turn,effect) txn, or FORCE-DONE after FINALIZE_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3 (OAR-9).

fields.label: Attempts
fields.description: Incremented on every finalize try for this effect; the force-done budget (FINALIZE_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3) reads it (D2 §1a).
